sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84639" key="poluastra/galos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ-αστράγᾰλος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰγ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84639.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strung with many knucklebones,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μάστις π.,</foreign> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀστραγαλωτή</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.234</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eryc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
